para_trans: The General Administrator, Government Trust, Maharashtra State, Mumbai is the General Administrator on the establishment of the office of a Government Trust, Group-A cadre of officers. of January, 2022. January 1, 2023, d. of January, 2024. January 1, 2025 and D. Final Service Excellence List as on 01.01.2026.
Government Circular No. AGO-2226 / P.No.28 / Ka. 1
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,

The General Administrator and Mea Trust, Maharashtra State, Mumbai, the General Administrator and the Administrative Trust at the establishment of the office, shall fix the seniority number and date of seniority of the officers of the Group-A cadre. 01.01.2022, d. 01.01.2023, d. 01.01.2024, d. 01.01.2025 b. Temporary Service Excellence List dated 01.01.2026, Reference No. 1 was published by the Government Circular here. No objections have been received within the prescribed period of date in accordance with this provisional merit list. Considering this, the present Service Excellence List is being finalised.
This final merit list is mentioned in the Annexure-A, B, C, D * & E along with this circular.
2. A copy of this Final Service Excellence List is being brought to the notice of the General Manager B Government Trust, Maharashtra State, Mumbai.
R. This Government Circular is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
